profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.bio: I build high-performance web applications using React, Node.js, ASP.NET C# and modern JavaScript. Passionate about clean architecture, great UX and shipping products that scale.
profile.tag: Open to Opportunities · Available for Hire

projects.name: Virtual Mouse
projects.desc: Developed a Virtual Mouse system using OpenCV in Python that enables users to control the computer cursor through hand gestures. Implemented real-time hand tracking and gesture recognition to perform actions like cursor movement, clicking, and scrolling without physical hardware. Focused on accuracy, responsiveness, and user-friendly interaction.

projects.name: Volume Control system
projects.desc: Developed a gesture-based volume control system using Python and OpenCV that allows users to adjust system volume through hand gestures. The application uses real-time hand tracking to measure finger distance and map it dynamically to volume levels, enabling a touchless and intuitive user experience.

projects.name: TGesture-Based Website Launcher
projects.desc: Developed a gesture-controlled website launcher using Python and OpenCV that allows users to open different websites based on hand gestures. The system detects the number of fingers shown via real-time hand tracking and maps each gesture (1 to 5 fingers) to a specific website, enabling fast and touchless navigation.

projects.name: AI World – AI Gesture Projects Hub
projects.desc: This website is developed using ASP.NET, AJAX, C#, and jQuery, showcasing a collection of AI-based computer vision projects. It provides downloadable resources and demos for systems like Virtual Mouse, Gesture Volume Control, and Gesture-Based Website Launcher, built using Python and OpenCV. The platform ensures smooth and dynamic user interaction through AJAX-based functionality.

projects.name: WhatsApp Billing Automation System using Node.js
projects.desc: > Developed a WhatsApp Web automation system using Node.js, HTML, and CSS with a polling mechanism and SQLite database integration. The system continuously monitors billing data from the SQLite database and automatically triggers WhatsApp message generation when a new bill is created. It enables sending invoices directly to customers via WhatsApp with pre-filled messages, improving efficiency, reducing manual work, and enhancing real-time customer communication.

projects.name: Dynamic Shoe E-Commerce Website using ASP.NET, C#, and AJAX
projects.desc: Developed a shoe marketing website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, ASP.NET, C#, and AJAX with a dynamic and responsive UI similar to Nike’s website.

projects.name: Expense Tracker — Personal Finance Management App
projects.desc: A full-stack expense tracking application with Google OAuth authentication. Track, manage, and monitor your personal finances with a clean and intuitive interface.
tech: CSS Google Identity Services (OAuth login via VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)

experience.desc: Developed an AI chatbot using the Gemini API, enabling real-time, context-aware conversations. Integrated API endpoints, optimized prompt design, and enhanced response quality for better user interaction.
Developed a WhatsApp automation system using Node.js and integrated it into the billing software, enabling automatic sending of bills to customers via WhatsApp with a print and send option.
